name: B45 Labs v1.0.3 Beta
body:
## [1.0.3] â€“ 2026-03-18 *(Beta)*

### Added

- **New Commands (6)**
  - Check Levels â€” validates level naming, elevation consistency, and ordering.
  - Check Walls â€” audits wall types, constraints, and structural parameters.
  - Check Rooms â€” checks room naming, area, and placement validity.
  - Sync Sheet Issue Date â€” batch-updates the issue date parameter across sheets.
  - Check Model Version â€” inspects and reports the Revit version of external files.
  - Upgrade Model Version â€” batch-upgrades external files to the current Revit version.

- **User Profile**
  - New *My Profile* tab in the About window.
  - Fields: Full Name, Preferred Name, Email, Company, Role, Industry, Sector, How you found us.
  - Preferred Name is used for avatar initials and the greeting message.
  - Profile is saved locally (`%AppData%\B45Labs\user-profile.json`) and synced to Bubble in the background.

- **Platform â€” Revit 2023 and 2024**
  - Expanded support from Revit 2025/2026 to all four versions: 2023, 2024, 2025, 2026.
  - Unified build system (R23/R24 via `net48` legacy project; R25/R26 via `net8.0-windows`).

### Changed

- **UI â€” Complete Redesign**
  - All command windows and dialogs rebuilt with the new Autodesk-style visual language.
  - Unified dark theme: consistent colors, spacing, typography, and corner radii throughout.
  - Autodesk brand blue (`#0696D7`) replaces the previous accent (`#2E7CF6`) across all surfaces.
  - Blue divider accent line below every title bar â€” consistent across all windows.
  - Flat button style (no drop shadows), uniform input field height (`34px`), and tighter spacing.
  - Icons, status bars, toolbar buttons, and DataGrid row styles aligned to the new design system.

- **Code Quality**
  - General stability improvements and internal refactors aligned with B45 coding standards.
  - Improved error handling and best-effort patterns across all commands.
  - `ElementId.Value` used consistently throughout (removed all `.IntegerValue` usages for R25/R26 compatibility).

- **Security**
  - Full security review pass on all commands and telemetry paths.
  - Confirmed: no sensitive data is collected, stored, or transmitted.

### Notes
- This is a **beta release**. Installer distributed as `B45Labs_Installer_v1.0.3_Beta`.
- Compatible with **Revit 2023, 2024, 2025, and 2026**.
- Feedback and bug reports: [support@B45Labs.com](mailto:support@B45Labs.com)

name: B45Labs v1.0.2
body:
## Overview

**B45Labs v1.0.2** is a major productivity + stability release introducing a new **Documentation** tab with 6 new commands, along with important UI upgrades, a Check Coordinates refactor, telemetry improvements (non-sensitive), and distribution hardening.

This release continues our â€œbest-effort + predictable behaviorâ€� direction: localized failures should not break the whole workflow, and outputs are easier to review and trust.

---

## Whatâ€™s new in v1.0.2

### 1) New: Documentation Tab (6 new commands)

This release adds a new **Documentation** tab focused on accelerating repetitive production tasks:

- **Move Views**
- **Duplicate Views**
- **Copy Legends**
- **Copy Schedules**
- **Create Multiple Sheets**
- **Copy Sheet From Another Model**

These commands are designed to reduce manual steps, improve consistency, and speed up documentation workflows.

---

### 2) UI & Experience

- Improved UI consistency across dialogs, icons, and output messages.
- Rebuilt the **About Me** experience (layout, content, and behavior).
- Updated About Me content and added an **optional donation button**.

---

### 3) Core Tools

- **Check Coordinates** refactor for higher reliability and maintainability.

---

### 4) Telemetry & Insights (non-sensitive)

- Upgraded usage/error tracking to better understand command distribution and error patterns.
- Improved mapping consistency for higher reporting quality.

> Security note: a code + telemetry security review was completed â€” **no sensitive data is collected**.

---

### 5) Fixes & Distribution

- Fixed YouTube link (**PT-BR tutorials recorded and currently being published; EN tutorials coming soon**).
- Fixed installer issues that could cause installation failures.
- Implemented **digital signing** for trusted distribution.

---

## Included documentation (shipped with the add-in)

The installer ships the following documents inside the B45Labs installation folder:

- `LICENSE` â€” main license file  
- `LICENSE_PROPRIETARY.md` â€” proprietary license notice for B45Labs  
- `TERMS.md` â€” Terms of Use / EULA  
- `PRIVACY.md` â€” Privacy Policy (analytics/diagnostics/data handling)  
- `SECURITY.md` â€” security posture and expectations  
- `SUPPORT.md` â€” support and issue reporting  
- `THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md` â€” third-party components and licenses  
- `CHANGELOG.md` â€” technical change history  
- `B45LABS_CODING_STANDARD.md` â€” engineering/coding standards reference  

Organizations should review these documents before large-scale deployment.

---

## Installation

1. Close all open Revit sessions.
2. Download the installer attached to this release:
   - **`B45Labs_Installer_1.0.2.exe`**
3. Run the installer and select the Revit versions to target (**2025** and/or **2026**).
4. Start Revit and confirm the **B45Labs** tab appears in the ribbon.

**Installer behavior (best-effort):**
- Removes legacy folders and `.addin` files from previous brands (BIM Genie / B45 Suite), when found.
- Creates a new folder under:  
  `{userappdata}\Autodesk\Revit\Addins\<Year>\B45Labs`
- Generates the corresponding `B45Labs.addin` pointing to `B45Labs_Addin.dll`.

If you previously installed older builds manually, verifying the add-ins folder after installation is recommended.

---

## Compatibility

- Autodesk Revit **2025**
- Autodesk Revit **2026**

Older Revit versions are not supported in this release.

---

## Feedback & support

To help us refine and extend B45Labs, please share:

- defect reports and crash scenarios  
- suggestions for new checks and commands  
- usability and workflow feedback  

Contact:
- GitHub Issues (this repository)
- Email: **support@b45labs.com**

When possible, include the Revit version, a brief model context, and any relevant tool output/logs.

name: B45Labs v1.0.1
body:
## Overview

**B45Labs v1.0.1** is a documentation + installer hardening release.  
This version strengthens the **EULA/Terms/Privacy** language, improves how legal text is displayed in the installer, and aligns repository documentation for the 1.0.1 distribution.

While this is a stability-focused release, we will continue iterating quickly based on real-world feedback. If you encounter issues or have suggestions, please open a GitHub Issue or email us.

---

## Whatâ€™s new in v1.0.1

### 1) Legal & compliance (EULA / Terms / Privacy)

This release clarifies key points for safer professional use:

- **No technical responsibility**: B45Labs is **not** the responsible technical party for any project outcome.  
  The add-in **assists** with checks and reporting, but **final verification and responsibility remain with the professional/user**.

- **Privacy & telemetry transparency**:
  - Only **non-sensitive** data is collected.
  - No collection of sensitive personal data.
  - Data is used strictly for **performance analysis, usage mapping, and distribution metrics**.
  - Data is stored on a **secure server** and used only for the purposes stated above.

### 2) Installer improvements

- Installer now shows the **full EULA** in the license step (**RTF**, readable in the UI).
- Optional **Privacy & Telemetry notice** can be displayed during setup (before install).
- Documentation packaged consistently alongside the installed add-in.

---

## Included documentation (shipped with the add-in)

The installer ships the following documents inside the B45Labs installation folder:

- `LICENSE` â€” main license file  
- `LICENSE_PROPRIETARY.md` â€” proprietary license notice for B45Labs  
- `TERMS.md` â€” Terms of Use / EULA  
- `PRIVACY.md` â€” Privacy Policy (analytics/diagnostics/data handling)  
- `SECURITY.md` â€” security posture and expectations  
- `SUPPORT.md` â€” support and issue reporting  
- `THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md` â€” third-party components and licenses  
- `CHANGELOG.md` â€” technical change history  
- `B45LABS_CODING_STANDARD.md` â€” engineering/coding standards reference

Organizations should review these documents before large-scale deployment.

---

## Installation

1. Close all open Revit sessions.
2. Download the installer attached to this release:
   - **`B45Labs_Installer_1.0.1.exe`**
3. Run the installer and select the Revit versions to target (**2025** and/or **2026**).
4. Start Revit and confirm the **B45Labs** tab appears in the ribbon.

**Installer behavior (best-effort):**
- Removes legacy folders and `.addin` files from previous brands (BIM Genie / B45 Suite), when found.
- Creates a new folder under:  
  `{userappdata}\Autodesk\Revit\Addins\<Year>\B45Labs`
- Generates the corresponding `B45Labs.addin` pointing to `B45Labs_Addin.dll`.

If you previously installed older builds manually, verifying the add-ins folder after installation is recommended.

---

## Compatibility

- Autodesk Revit **2025**
- Autodesk Revit **2026**

Older Revit versions are not supported in this release.

---

## Feedback & support

To help us refine and extend B45Labs, please share:

- defect reports and crash scenarios  
- suggestions for new checks and commands  
- usability and workflow feedback  

Contact:
- GitHub Issues (this repository)
- Email: **support@b45labs.com**

When possible, include the Revit version, a brief model context, and any relevant tool output/logs.

name: B45Labs v1.0.0 â€“ Rebrand + Revit 2025/2026 support
body:
## Overview

B45Labs v1.0.0 is the first stable release of the B45Labs Revit add-in under the new brand, with full support for Revit 2025 and 2026, a new installer, and an updated legal and packaging structure.

Although this is a stable build, we expect to iterate quickly based on real-world feedback. Users are strongly encouraged to share questions, suggestions, and issue reports so we can continue to refine the toolset.

---

## Main changes in v1.0.0

### 1. Rebrand and packaging

- Add-in rebranded from **BIM Genie** / **B45 Suite** to **B45Labs**.
- New installer:
  - Allows the user to select which Revit versions to target (2025 and/or 2026).
  - Cleans legacy folders and `.addin` files for previous brands (BIM Genie / B45 Suite) in the user add-ins directory.
  - Automatically generates the `.addin` file for each selected Revit version, pointing to `B45Labs_Addin.dll` and `B45Labs.Tools.RibbonApp`.
- Installer output and documentation consolidated under the `B45Labs_Installer` structure.

### 2. Coordinates tools

- **Get Element Coordinates**
  - Rewritten for higher numerical consistency and precision.
  - Cross-checks results with Spot Elevation where applicable.
  - Detects Survey Point clip status (clipped / unclipped).
  - Addresses previous X/Y inversion issues in specific project configurations.
  - Output formatted for clear reading (X, Y, Z presented in aligned columns).
  - Results organized by reference system: Survey Point â†’ Project Base Point â†’ Internal Origin.

- **Check Coordinates**
  - Now uses the new *Get Element Coordinates* engine as its core.
  - Detects misalignment between Survey Point and Project Base Point.
  - Provides clearer and more consistent messages, including explicit feedback on detected issues.
  - Internal logic simplified to make ongoing maintenance and future extensions easier.

### 3. Model health

- **Check Model Health**
  - Adds a new **Links & Imports Breakdown** section with a structured view of Revit and CAD links.
  - Segments internal checks by theme (Overview, Views, Elements, Links, and others) to support auditing workflows.
  - Optimizes data collection using `FilteredElementCollector` to reduce overhead on larger models.
  - Produces outputs that are more suitable for review, reporting, and QA/QC audits.

### 4. Code protection and runtime behavior

- Add-in assemblies are now obfuscated:
  - Namespaces, types, and methods are renamed.
  - Sensitive strings are protected where applicable.
  - UI namespaces, command entry points, and Revit integration points are preserved to maintain stability.
- Existing usage tracking and diagnostic logging remain in place, aligned with the Privacy Policy, to support ongoing stability improvements.

---

## Documentation and legal

The installer ships with the following documents in the B45Labs installation folder:

- `LICENSE` â€“ main license file.
- `LICENSE_PROPRIETARY.md` â€“ proprietary license notice for B45Labs.
- `TERMS.md` â€“ Terms of Use / EULA.
- `PRIVACY.md` â€“ Privacy Policy covering analytics, diagnostics, and data handling.
- `SECURITY.md` â€“ security posture and expectations.
- `SUPPORT.md` â€“ how to obtain support and report issues.
- `THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md` â€“ third-party components and license information.
- `CHANGELOG.md` â€“ technical change history.

These documents should be reviewed by organizations before large-scale deployment.

---

## Installation

1. Close all open Revit sessions.
2. Download the installer attached to this release:

   - `B45Labs_Installer_v1.0.0.exe`

3. Run the installer and select the Revit versions to target (2025 and/or 2026).
4. After installation, start Revit and confirm that the **B45Labs** tab appears in the ribbon.

The installer will attempt to:

- Remove legacy folders and `.addin` files from previous brands (BIM Genie / B45 Suite).
- Create a new `{userappdata}\Autodesk\Revit\Addins\<Year>\B45Labs` folder per selected version.
- Generate the corresponding `B45Labs.addin` file pointing to `B45Labs_Addin.dll`.

If you previously installed older builds manually, verifying the add-ins folder after installation is recommended.

---

## Compatibility

- Autodesk Revit 2025
- Autodesk Revit 2026

Older Revit versions are not supported in this release.

---

## Feedback and support

To help us refine and extend B45Labs, users are invited to share:

- defect reports and crash scenarios,
- suggestions for new checks and commands,
- usability and workflow feedback.

You can contact us via:

- GitHub Issues in this repository, or  
- Email: **support@B45Labs.com**

When possible, include Revit version, a brief description of the model context, and any relevant diagnostic output from the tool. This information significantly accelerates analysis and resolution.

name: BIM Genie v0.0.11-beta
body:
## [0.0.11-beta] â€“ 2025-08-30

### ðŸ”§ Improved
- **Get Element Coordinates**
  - Rewritten for higher precision using cross-reference with Spot Elevation.
  - Now automatically detects Survey Point clip status (clipped/unclipped).
  - Fixed X/Y value inversion in specific project contexts.
  - Results are now formatted for better readability (X, Y, Z in clear columns).
  - Organized presentation: Survey Point â†’ Base Point â†’ Internal Origin.

- **Check Coordinates**
  - Now powered by the new `Get Element Coordinates` engine with full precision.
  - Added detection of misalignment between Survey and Base Points.
  - Output messages are clearer and more consistent, with feedback on detected issues.
  - Logic simplified for easier maintenance.

- **Check Model Health**
  - New command: **Links & Imports Breakdown** â€“ analyzes linked RVT and CAD files.
  - Performance optimized in data collection using `FilteredElementCollector`.
  - Better segmentation of internal checks by theme (Overview, Views, Elements, Links...).
  - Outputs are now more user-friendly for reading and auditing.

### ðŸ�ž Fixed
- Fixed bug where coordinates were mirrored in some models.
- Visual and rotation adjustments to icons in the â€œModel Checkâ€� tab.
- Fixed bug affecting models with multiple active survey points.

---

ðŸ”� **Notes**
- This is a **beta release**, compatible only with **Revit 2025**.
- Feedback and bug reports: [support@bimgenie.com](mailto:support@bimgenie.com)

name: BIM Genie v0.0.10â€“beta
body:
## [0.0.10-beta] â€“ 2025-07-23

### Added
- **Move Views** â€“ New tool to batch relocate views between sheets.
- **Toggle Reference Points** â€“ Allows quick toggle of Survey Point, Project Base Point, and Internal Origin visibility.
- **Clear View With/Without Links** â€“ New options added to Clear View dropdown.
- **Reset Chat** â€“ Command to reset Assistant history and context.
- **New icons** for all tools, including light/dark variants.
- **New command groups** in the Ribbon: Model Check, Model Management, Clash Analysis, External Tools, and Settings.

### Changed
- Full **Ribbon redesign**:
  - Commands now grouped by category for intuitive access.
  - Icons updated for clarity, visibility, and consistency.
- Assistant commands were remapped to reflect UI changes.
- Improved dark/light **theme detection** with dynamic icon switching.

### Improved
- BIM Genie Assistant layout and alignment polished.
- Analytics system now accurately tracks usage of renamed commands.
- Better performance for command loading and ribbon rendering.
- Installer now fully removes outdated folders and databases during updates.
- Improved icon scaling and crispness on high-DPI displays.

### Fixed
- Fixed command routing inconsistencies due to refactoring.
- Addressed Assistant command mismatches in some Revit versions.
- Resolved tooltip duplication and icon flickering in light mode.
- Fixed issue where painted elements were not being correctly reset.

### Notes
- This is a **beta release**, focused on stability and UI/UX improvements.  
- Compatible only with **Revit 2025**.  
- Feedback and bug reports: [support@bimgenie.com](mailto:support@bimgenie.com)

name: BIM Genie v0.0.9 â€“ Beta
body:
## BIM Genie v0.0.9-beta

This version includes refinements to the ribbon structure and internal command mapping to support a more scalable, organized, and context-aware BIM Genie experience.

---

### Changed
- Reorganized ribbon command structure by logical category
- Unified command naming for Assistant, UI, and tracking systems
- Updated `Clear View`, `Model Check`, and `Settings` group logic

### Improved
- Assistant recognition of command triggers
- Theme toggling and visual alignment across Light/Dark modes
- Tooltip and button label standardization

### Fixed
- Ribbon group ordering issues
- Tooltip mismatches and minor layout inconsistencies

---

name: BIM Genie v0.0.6 - Beta
body:
## ðŸš€ BIMGenie Installer v0.0.6

This release brings important improvements to the installation experience of the BIMGenie plugin for Revit 2025:

### âœ… What's New

- ðŸ”„ **Automatic Revit Process Closure**  
  The installer now checks if Revit is running and offers to close it automatically using a safe shutdown process.

- ðŸ§¼ **Database Cleanup Before Installation**  
  If a previous BIMGenie local database exists (`%AppData%\BIMGenie`), it will be safely removed before a fresh installation.

- ðŸ’¡ **Improved Fallback Handling**  
  If Revit is not closed successfully, the user is notified and guided to close it manually before continuing.

- ðŸ§¹ **Installer Script Refactor**  
  Code has been cleaned and simplified. Unused UI screens and redundant logic were removed for a leaner, more robust setup process.

---

### ðŸ“¦ File Included

- `BIMGenie_Installer_v0.0.6.exe`

Please make sure to close Revit before installing.  
Enjoy the smoother experience! ðŸ˜Ž

---

**Contact:** [support@bimgenie.com](mailto:support@bimgenie.com)  
**Repository:** [BIMGenie on GitHub](https://github.com/Bruno-Senna/BIMGenie)

name: BIM Genie v0.0.1 - Beta
body:
First beta release of BIM Genie!

This is the first public release of BIM Genie for testing purposes. Please download and test the installer, and report any issues or feedback to support@bimgenie.com.

**Note**: Windows Defender SmartScreen may warn about running this app since it is new and unsigned. Click "More Info" and "Run Anyway" to proceed.

Enjoy and thank you for testing! ðŸš€
